text: The cheetah sprints across the savanna faster than any other land animal.
A narwhal is a marine mammal whose tusk spirals out from its jaw.
The grizzly bear forages for berries before its winter hibernation.
A peregrine falcon dives at over two hundred miles per hour to catch prey.
The sedan merged onto the highway behind a slow delivery truck.
A hatchback is a compact vehicle popular for city commuting.
The motorcycle weaved between cars stuck in rush-hour traffic.
An SUV towed the small boat trailer up the mountain road.
The violinist tuned her strings before the orchestra began.
A trumpet blared the opening notes of the jazz set.
The pianist rehearsed the sonata late into the night.
The oak tree shed its acorns across the quiet park lawn.
A fern unfurled its fronds in the damp forest shade.
The sunflower turned its broad face toward the morning light.
A thunderstorm rolled across the plains, drenching the dry fields.
The blizzard buried the mountain pass under three feet of snow.
